allow: Bash(node -e "const {Keypair} = require\(''@stellar/stellar-sdk''\); const kp = Keypair.random\(\); console.log\(''PUBLIC:'', kp.publicKey\(\)\); console.log\(''SECRET:'', kp.secret\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {Keypair} = require\(''''@stellar/stellar-sdk''''\); const kp = Keypair.random\(\); console.log\(''''PUBLIC:'''', kp.publicKey\(\)\); console.log\(''''SECRET:'''', kp.secret\(\)\);")
